_strict_reconciliation.basis: SG Stage B auto-label strict tier was reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine findings; original auto-label breadth preserved in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. This is internal benchmark cleanup, not legal advice or procurement-grade review.

ideal_must_detect.matched_text: A one‑time export of an employee contact directory to a regional HRIS vendor in Malaysia has been approved
Personal data fields in diligence rooms are limited to role‑based contact points
unnecessary identity‑number fields are removed as part of minimisation
role mailboxes only—no personal addresses to be used
Only aggregated or role‑based data is accessible to Orchard’s diligence team

Minimisation and retention: Personal data fields in diligence rooms are limited to role‑based contact points; retention for diligence artifacts is capped at 6 years per Policy PD‑RET‑06, after which erasure procedures apply; these are policy statements and not notices of any breach.

Representations: The issuer represents that, as at signing, it is not aware of any unresolved PDPA enforcement notices and has implemented a data breach response plan; references to “erasure,” “DSAR,” and “consent withdrawal” in this term sheet reflect policy controls, not active incidents.
